description: Verify structured context handoff requirements before GUI workflow design begins.

command: import json, pathlib; packs=json.loads(pathlib.Path('agent-system/workflow-packs.registry.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))['packs']; assert all(pack.get('context_envelope_required') is True for pack in packs.values())

import json, pathlib; schema=json.loads(pathlib.Path('agent-system/context-envelope.schema.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8')); required=set(schema['required']); expected={'context_id','task_id','context_version','cycle_index','summary','goal','user_intent','facts','source_refs','artifact_refs','decisions','open_questions','omissions','risk_flags','permissions','context_budget','handoff_reason','state_hash'}; assert expected <= required; assert schema['properties']['version']['const'] == '2.0.0'; assert schema['properties']['current_stage']['enum'] == ['context','decide','act','evaluate']
